entries.description: Authored ai-assignment.md via route(analysis) on gemini-pro
Extended parseSessionSetConfig with verificationMode (enum-validated, defaults out-of-band-or-none); added VerificationMode type + SessionSetConfig field

New pure module src/utils/tierLegibility.ts (shouldRenderPlusFraction D1 predicate + hasTypedVerificationSession + tooltips); wired into readSessionSets (plusFraction on SessionSet), fractionFor + RowPayload.fractionTooltip + client.js title attr
D2 quiet lw marker: tierMarker/tierTooltip in SessionSetsModel, RowPayload.tierMarker/tierTooltip, client.js tierSpan, tree.css .row-tier-marker (Set 050 asterisk pattern)

tierLegibility.test.ts (config parsing matrix, D1 predicate matrix incl. before/after typed session, D2 markers, readSessionSets e2e fixtures); suites: TS 720 pass + 2 pre-existing Set-026 fails, Python 1185 pass/1 skip, esbuild compile clean
Cross-provider verification R1 gpt-5-4 ISSUES_FOUND (1 Major: quoted YAML enum values rejected by stringRe) -> fixed + 4 tests -> R2 gpt-5-4 VERIFIED (724 TS pass)

Extended deriveBlockedByPrereqs to carry the full unsatisfied list (UnsatisfiedPrerequisite: slug+condition+targetState, 'unknown' for unresolvable slugs) on SessionSet.unsatisfiedPrereqs; blockedByPrereqs kept as compatibility boolean == list non-empty

D3 quiet blocked marker: BLOCKED_MARKER chain glyph (U+26D3+FE0E) + blockedMarker/blockedTooltip in SessionSetsModel (terminal suppression unchanged); RowPayload.blockedMarker/blockedTooltip; client.js blockedSpan + tree.css .row-blocked-marker (Set 050 asterisk pattern); [BLOCKED BY PREREQS] badge retired from descriptionFor; ActionRegistry gains dabblerSessionSets.openPrerequisiteSpec (flat, non-terminal blocked rows only) + openFile.ts handler (direct open / QuickPick when multiple; unknown-slug info message) + package.json contribution

README 'Prerequisites and the blocked marker' section authored via route(documentation) on gemini-pro (auto-verify gpt-5-4-mini flagged missing QuickPick mention -> folded in); stale badge refs reconciled in README flat-actions list (also dropped retired 'Set Orchestrator') + session-state-schema.md Prerequisites/Bucketing sections + new pointer paragraph

prerequisites.test.ts: unsatisfied-list assertions on all derivation cases + cross-root readAllSessionSets test (two stub workspace roots) + blockedMarker/blockedTooltip suite (terminal suppression, unknown-slug copy, multi-prereq tooltip) + badge-retired source scan; actionRegistry.test.ts: 16-action registry + openPrerequisiteSpec applicability matrix; 7 fakeSet fixtures gained unsatisfiedPrereqs; Playwright blocked-by-prereqs.spec.ts rewritten badge->marker (4 scenarios incl. tooltip title attr). Suites: TS 730 pass + 2 pre-existing Set-026 fails, tsc clean, esbuild clean, Python 1185 pass/1 skip (1 env-key-only failure passes with keys loaded)

Cross-provider verification R1 gpt-5-4 ISSUES_FOUND (1 Major: alleged 17-vs-16 actionRegistry expected-set inconsistency) -> DISPROVEN empirically (scripted regex count = 16 IDs; openFolder/openPlaywright never members; test + full suite re-run 730 pass) -> R2 gpt-5-4 accepted disposition: VERIFIED. Artifacts: s2-verification.md, s2-verification-round-2.md, s2-issues.json

Pure byte-preserving spec.md tier rewrite helper src/utils/tierRewrite.ts: rewriteSpecTier (config-block-scoped, quote/comment/CRLF-preserving, absent-key insertion, commented-line immune) + switchToFullWarnings guardrail predicate (reuses providerKeyPresent).

dabblerSessionSets.switchTier command (commands/switchTier.ts): tier QuickPick reusing exported promptTier copy from gitScaffold, rewrite+view refresh; ActionRegistry flat entry group 504 gated isNotStarted; package.json contribution; extension.ts safeRegister; watcherInventory allowlist lines bumped 190->191/226->227 (import shift).

D4 switch-to-full guardrails wired in switchTier.ts: inform-only warnings after the applied switch when no provider key visible (providerKeyPresent over process.env) and when ai_router/router-config.yaml is absent under set.root (points at Dabbler: Install ai-router).

tierRewrite.test.ts (14 rewrite-matrix + 5 guardrail tests) + actionRegistry.test.ts updated to 17 actions with not-started-only switchTier gating test. TS unit suite 750 pass + 2 pre-existing Set-026 fails; Python 1185 pass/1 skip (lone metrics failure reproduced as shell key-absence gotcha, green with keys loaded).

Cross-provider verification: R1 gpt-5-4 ISSUES_FOUND 2 Major (S061-S3-V1-001 set.root guardrail base; S061-S3-V1-002 malformed-scalar handling) -> 001 DISPROVEN empirically (set.root = workspace root, fileSystem.ts:420/761), 002 half-fixed (early same-tier return removed; helper is decision authority + repair path test) half-disproven (parser lowercases, fileSystem.ts:253). R2 narrow re-verify gpt-5-4: VERIFIED. Artifacts: s3-verification.md, s3-issues.json, s3-verification-round-2.md. TS 752 pass post-fix.

Authored 061-explorer-ux-polish-uat-checklist.json (25 rows, 6 judgment) via route(documentation) -> gemini-pro $0.0641. Covers D1 N/M+ before/after typed verification session + tooltip, D1 negatives (Full/Mode-A), D2 lw marker+tooltip present/absent, D3 blocked glyph U+26D3+FE0E + multi/unknown-slug tooltip + badge-absent + terminal suppression + Open Prerequisite Spec, D4 Switch Tier not-started-only + both directions + switch-to-Full guardrails + already-on-tier + repaired-malformed, and a Set 060 Getting Started no-regression sweep. Validated routed draft against shipped strings/glyph; corrected 2 rows (malformed-scalar example was actually valid; GS form misdescribed as name/create + .dabbler dir).

Built local UAT .vsix: tools/dabbler-ai-orchestration/dabbler-ai-orchestration-0.29.0.vsix (31 files, ~1003 KB). Pre-build TS unit suite: 752 passing + 2 pre-existing Set-026 failures (configEditor-foundation, notificationsSection) — no S4 regressions (S4 added only the UAT checklist doc). Awaiting operator UAT on a local build (F5 dev host or Install-from-VSIX) as the pre-publish gate before the 0.30.0 bump.

Set cut short by operator direction (2026-06-11): operator UAT and the 0.30.0 Marketplace release are deferred to Set 062 (062-lightweight-verification-affordance), which ships one combined 0.30.0 carrying both sets (Set 059->060 fold precedent). Remaining S4 steps (operator UAT, version bump, tag push) are superseded per the spec's Session 4 scope-change note (commit ba32b33). Session 4 closes by recording this deferral; wrote the set's change-log.md. The authored UAT checklist (061-explorer-ux-polish-uat-checklist.json) carries forward - Set 062's combined checklist subsumes its rows.

Cross-provider verification of the deferral close: VERIFIED, 0 issues (s4-verification.md). Verifier gemini-2.5-pro via direct call_model fallback after the router's first-choice gpt-5-4 verifier hit OpenAI 429 rate limits on two consecutive route() attempts (3 retries each) - the Step 6 verifier-failure ladder's cross-provider fallback. Tokens 7817 in / 111 out; cost ~$0.011 ESTIMATED from token counts at published gemini-2.5-pro pricing (direct call_model bypasses router metrics, so no router-metrics.jsonl entry exists for this call).
